title: Name Me Lawand
overview: Void of any language, communication or true sense of self, Lawand struggles to piece together his surroundings in his new home in Derby, England, after a traumatic and turbulent year of seeking asylum through Europe.

trailers.title: Name Me Lawand director Edward Lovelace, Steve Crump OBE and Sophie Stone | BFI Q&A
